# chalk_environment (Data Source)

Chalk environment data source

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "chalk_environment" "example" {
  name = "production"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Environment identifier

### Read-Only

- `active_deployment_id` (String) Active deployment ID
- `additional_cron_env_vars` (Map of String) Additional cron environment variables
- `additional_env_vars` (Map of String) Additional environment variables
- `archived_at` (String) Archived at timestamp
- `background_persistence_deployment_id` (String) Background persistence deployment ID
- `bigtable_instance_name` (String) Bigtable instance name
- `bigtable_table_name` (String) Bigtable table name
- `branch_kube_cluster_name` (String) Branch Kubernetes cluster name
- `branch_url` (String) Branch URL
- `cloud_account_locator` (String) Cloud Account Locator
- `cloud_config` (Object) Cloud configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--cloud_config))
- `cloud_provider` (String) Cloud provider
- `cloud_region` (String) Cloud region
- `cloud_tenancy_id` (String) Cloud tenancy ID
- `cluster_gateway_id` (String) Cluster gateway ID
- `cluster_timescaledb_id` (String) Cluster TimescaleDB ID
- `cluster_timescaledb_secret` (String) Cluster TimescaleDB secret
- `dashboard_url` (String) Dashboard URL
- `default_planner` (String) Default planner
- `emq_uri` (String) EMQ URI
- `engine_docker_registry_path` (String) Engine Docker registry path
- `engine_kube_cluster_name` (String) Engine Kubernetes cluster name
- `environment_buckets` (Object) Environment object storage buckets (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--environment_buckets))
- `feature_store_secret` (String) Feature store secret
- `grpc_engine_url` (String) gRPC engine URL
- `is_sandbox` (Boolean) Is sandbox environment
- `kube_cluster_mode` (String) Kubernetes cluster mode
- `kube_cluster_name` (String) Kubernetes cluster name
- `kube_job_namespace` (String) Kubernetes job namespace
- `kube_preview_namespace` (String) Kubernetes preview namespace
- `kube_service_account_name` (String) Kubernetes service account name
- `metadata_server_metrics_store_secret` (String) Metadata server metrics store secret
- `metrics_bus_topic` (String) Metrics bus topic
- `name` (String) Environment name
- `offline_store_secret` (String) Offline store secret
- `online_persistence_mode` (String) Online persistence mode
- `online_store_kind` (String) Online store kind for the environment
- `online_store_secret` (String) Online store secret
- `pinned_base_image` (String) Pinned base image
- `postgres_secret` (String) Postgres secret
- `private_pip_repositories` (String) Private pip repositories
- `project_id` (String) Project ID
- `query_server_metrics_store_secret` (String) Query server metrics store secret
- `result_bus_topic` (String) Result bus topic
- `service_url` (String) Service URL
- `shadow_engine_kube_cluster_name` (String) Shadow engine Kubernetes cluster name
- `skip_offline_writes_for_online_cached_features` (Boolean) Skip offline writes for online cached features
- `source_bundle_bucket` (String) Source bundle bucket
- `spec_config_json` (Map of String) Spec config JSON
- `streaming_query_service_uri` (String) Streaming query service URI
- `team_id` (String) Team ID
- `vpc_connector_name` (String) VPC connector name
- `worker_url` (String) Worker URL
